channel.title: Josh Strife Plays
channel.description:
Welcome, I'm Josh Strife Hayes, I critique and analyse videogames.
This channel is all about playing those games we all love and asking, were they really that good?
channel.itunes:author: Josh Strife Plays
channel.itunes:subtitle: Josh Strife Plays
channel.itunes:summary:
Welcome, I'm Josh Strife Hayes, I critique and analyse videogames.
This channel is all about playing those games we all love and asking, were they really that good?

item.title: Was it Good? - Dino Crisis 2
item.description:
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/joshstrifehayes Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/joshstrifehayes Discord: https://discord.gg/GM2sCUX Twitter: https://www.twitter.com/joshstrifehayes
#####
GoG Dino Crisis Bundle: https://bit.ly/dino_crisis
#####
I'LL SaVe YoU BrO!
Dino Crisis 2 is the opposite to Dino Crisis 1, if this game is a survival horror, it's because the dinosaurs are trying to survive you.
Thanks as usual to the incredible supporters on Patreon and twitch, and the GoG for keeping old games alive!
item.itunes:author: Josh Strife Plays

#####
GoG Dino Crisis Bundle: https://bit.ly/dino_crisis
#####
I'LL SaVe YoU BrO!
Dino Crisis 2 is the opposite to Dino Crisis 1, if this game is a survival horror, it's because the dinosaurs are trying to survive you.
Thanks as usual to the incredible supporters on Patreon and twitch, and the GoG for keeping old games alive!
